title: Kids Thai Cooking Class
shortDesc: Little chefs learn to make Pad Thai and mango sticky rice in this hands-on family cooking class.
description: This fun, hands-on Thai cooking class is designed specifically for kids and families. Children as young as 5 can join, guided by a friendly chef to cook authentic Thai dishes like Pad Thai, spring rolls, and mango sticky rice. Classes are held in an open-air kitchen and include a visit to the morning market to pick fresh ingredients. You eat what you cook!
priceNote: From 800 THB per person, children 400 THB
